prompt: Matte-finish photography with warm, slightly desaturated tones on an off-white cream (#F5F0EB) background. Bold uppercase geometric sans-serif GRIND wordmark in black (#000000). Muted pastel accent colors. Minimal composition with generous negative space. Soft natural lighting with gentle shadows. Premium but unpretentious London urban-cool coffee brand energy. Create: a static ad with a warm cream (#F5F0EB) background. Top third: large bold black uppercase geometric sans-serif headline reading "YOUR MORNING, UPGRADED.". Below in smaller text: "Specialty-grade coffee in home-compostable pods. No compromise.". Bottom half: a slim rectangular Grind coffee pod box in dusty pink with bold black GRIND wordmark, sitting on a marble surface with a few compostable coffee pods scattered casually beside it and some whole coffee beans. Shot at 50mm f/2.8 from slightly above. GRIND logo bottom right. Clean, authoritative. 4:5 aspect ratio.

Matte-finish photography with warm, slightly desaturated tones on an off-white cream (#F5F0EB) background. Bold uppercase geometric sans-serif GRIND wordmark in black (#000000). Muted pastel accent colors. Minimal composition with generous negative space. Soft natural lighting with gentle shadows. Premium but unpretentious London urban-cool coffee brand energy. Full background is a photorealistic close-up food scene of freshly baked cinnamon pastries and warm caramel sauce drizzled over dark chocolate on a marble surface, scattered coffee beans and cinnamon sticks. Shot at 50mm f/2.8, shallow depth of field, warm bakery lighting. Top third: large bold white sans-serif headline reading "A coffee pod that tastes like your favourite London cafe" with the word favourite in bold italic for emphasis. A Grind coffee pod box in warm terracotta with black GRIND wordmark placed bottom-right, angled 15 degrees as if casually laid into the scene. Very bottom edge: smaller bold sans-serif "NO COMPROMISE. JUST GREAT COFFEE.". Food is the hero — product is the payoff. 1:1 aspect ratio.

Matte-finish photography with warm, slightly desaturated tones. Bold uppercase geometric sans-serif GRIND wordmark in black (#000000). Minimal composition. Soft natural lighting. Center top: white circle with "VS". Left header: "PLASTIC PODS" with a generic aluminium Nespresso-style coffee pod and list with X marks: "500 years to decompose", "Aluminium waste", "Mass-produced blends", "Corporate coffee", "Landfill". Matte-finish photography with warm, slightly desaturated tones on an off-white cream (#F5F0EB) background. Bold uppercase geometric sans-serif GRIND wordmark in black (#000000). Muted pastel accent colors. Minimal composition with generous negative space. Soft natural lighting with gentle shadows. Premium but unpretentious London urban-cool coffee brand energy. Below headline: white rounded-rectangle CTA button with black uppercase text "SHOP GRIND". Center: a Grind coffee pod box in sage green with bold black GRIND wordmark, angled slightly, hero-lit with soft studio lighting. Surrounding the product: scattered whole coffee beans, ground coffee dust, a broken piece of dark chocolate, and green coffee leaves arranged in an exploded radial pattern creating visual energy and texture on the cream background surface. Matte-finish photography with warm, slightly desaturated tones. Premium but unpretentious London urban-cool coffee brand energy. Match the exact Grind product packaging — slim rectangular box with bold uppercase geometric sans-serif GRIND wordmark in black on a muted pastel-colored background. Create: a lifestyle product photo set in a warm modern London kitchen with soft natural daylight from a nearby window and a naturally blurred background showing white subway tiles and a copper kettle. Frame is very slightly off-center — product not perfectly centered, bottom edge of product very slightly cropped — feels found rather than composed. Slight natural sensor grain consistent with a phone camera in indoor daylight. Subtle natural vignette at frame corners. Center of frame, large and dominant: a Grind coffee pod box in dusty pink with bold black uppercase GRIND wordmark, sitting on a light marble countertop, slightly angled toward the viewer. A few scattered coffee beans on the surface around the base of the box for casual realism. Stuck directly onto the front face of the product: a yellow square post-it note, slightly crooked and not perfectly straight — slightly trapezoid from the angle it was pressed on. Realistic paper texture with a horizontal crease across the middle as if it was folded once. Subtle curl at bottom-right corner only. Held at the top by a small piece of clear tape, slightly wrinkled. One word in the handwriting is slightly heavier-inked or underlined from natural pen pressure. Handwritten in thick black marker-style lettering, imperfect and uneven, lowercase natural writing: "switched to these" line break "pods actually compost" line break "coffee is unreal" line break "never going back". No attribution line. No signature. Bottom center of frame, outside the photo on a plain off-white strip: small plain lowercase sans-serif caption text: "grfrnd.com — your morning just got greener". No logo overlay anywhere in the frame. Brand identity carried entirely by the product packaging visible in the photo. No border. Warm, authentic, inviting. 4:5 aspect ratio.

Matte-finish photography with warm, slightly desaturated tones on an off-white cream (#F5F0EB) background. Bold uppercase geometric sans-serif GRIND wordmark in black (#000000). Muted pastel accent colors — dusty pink, sage green, terracotta. Minimal composition with generous negative space. Soft natural lighting with gentle shadows. Premium but unpretentious London urban-cool coffee brand energy. Create: a review-driven ad with a solid black (#000000) color block background filling the entire image. Top half: large bold italic serif text in white with curly quotation marks reading "Genuinely the best coffee I've ever had at home". Directly below the quote: five large filled gold star icons in a horizontal row. Bottom left, overlapping the color background: a white rounded-corner review card with subtle shadow, containing: a small gray circular default avatar icon, beside it "Sarah T." in bold dark sans-serif with a small British flag emoji, below the name a blue checkmark icon with "Verified Buyer" in small blue text. Below the reviewer info: the review body text in medium-weight dark sans-serif reading "I've tried every subscription coffee service going and nothing comes close. The pods are compostable which was a huge selling point but honestly the taste alone would keep me subscribed. The House Blend is smooth, rich, and better than most cafe coffees. My Nespresso machine has never..." ending with "...Read more" in bold black text — the truncation is intentional to create curiosity. Below the review text: "Was this review helpful?" in small gray text with a thumbs-up icon and "2.4K" beside it. Bottom right, overlapping both the card and the color background: a Grind coffee pod box in dusty pink with bold black GRIND wordmark angled slightly toward the viewer, sitting on the color block surface with a subtle shadow beneath. 4:5 aspect ratio.
